---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

A short summary is below; the full CV is available as a PDF.

```{=html}
<p style="margin:1.5rem 0 2.2rem;">
  <a class="es-btn" href="assets/cv/CV_NidhiJain.pdf">Download CV (PDF) &darr;</a>
</p>
```

**Education**

- PhD, Economics — Shiv Nadar University, 2024 (advisor: Saptarshi P. Ghosh)
- MA, Economics — Delhi School of Economics, 2013
- BA (Hons), Economics — Hansraj College, University of Delhi, 2010

**Current position**

- Instructor, Economics — EconSchool (2015 –)
- Academic Specialist, Economics — New York University Abu Dhabi (2023 –)

**Fields**

- Research: microeconomic theory, political economy, information economics
- Teaching: microeconomics, game theory, mathematical methods, corporate finance

**Publication**

- "Responsive democracy and commercial media" (with S. P. Ghosh, C. Martinelli, J. Roy), *Economics Letters* 222, 2023.

**Before academia**

- Quantitative Analyst, Tata Consultancy Services (2013–2015) — model monitoring and validation for retail-banking scorecards under Basel guidelines.

**Software**

- R, LaTeX, SAS
